ai_summary: CIE Automotive India Limited reported moderate year-over-year profit growth in H1 2026, though Q2 saw a sequential dip largely due to lower other income. A material impact is the significant deterioration in operating cash flow, primarily driven by a substantial 140% increase in trade receivables and higher inventories. This disproportionate surge in receivables, relative to revenue growth, presents a key red flag concerning working capital efficiency and cash conversion.
